'''Gavial Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]]. Composed of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]], the unit was stationed in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] during the Rebellion's operations there.

The squadron was assigned to the newly-built [[Starship/Legends|starship]] component factory known as [[Soren]], where it augmented the static defenses already in place there. When the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] conducted its [[Attack on Soren|attack]] on Soren, the unit's starfighters attempted to drive off the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. Despite being reinforced by the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Crucible (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Crucible'']] and its own attached squadrons, the unit was decimated by Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
